title: AN ACT INCLUDING THE PROVINCE OF ROMBLON IN THE REGION SERVED BY PANAY DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-EIGHT HUNDRED FIFTY-SIX.

chunks.text:
H. No. 829 / 65 OG No. 3, 492 (January 20, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4775, June 18, 1966 ]

AN ACT INCLUDING THE PROVINCE OF ROMBLON IN THE REGION SERVED BY PANAY DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-EIGHT HUNDRED FIFTY-SIX.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section one of Republic Act Numbered Thirty-eight hundred

fifty-six is amended to read as follows:

"SECTION 1.

Declaration of Policy

"SECTION 1.

Declaration of Policy

.âIt is hereby declared to be the policy of Congress to adopt accelerated measures and to utilize to the maximum local resources and talents to bolster agro-industrial development through the leaderÂship, guidance and support of the Government. To this end, cognizant of the necessity of grouping together regional areas having similar economic and geographical basis, the provinces grouped together as one region comÂprising the Island of Panay and the Province of Romblon, hereinafter referred to as the region, shall constitute a Regional Development Authority for the purpose of conducting economic surveys to determine its agriculÂtural and industrial potentialities and mapping out and implementing plans and programs to effect the coordinated and integrated efforts of various government agencies, as well as private entities engaged in activities conducive to rapid regional agro-industrial development; of providing active leadership in the establishment of pioneering inÂdustrial, agricultural or similar enterprises and lending financial, managerial and/or technical assistance to existing or prospective ventures within the region."

SEC. 2. Section twelve of the same Act is amended to read as follows:

"SEC. 12.

Board of DirectorsâComposition

.âThe corÂporate powers of the Authority shall be vested in and exercised by a Board of Directors herein referred to as the Board, which shall be composed of five members including its chairman, appointed by the President of the Philippines with the consent of the Commission on Appointments. The governors of the Provinces of Aklan, Capiz, Antique, Iloilo and Romblon shall be members

ex-officio

of the Board and as such shall take part in all its meetings, deliberations and discussions, but shall not have the right to vote, except as hereinafter provided."

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1966.
